stem:
The table summarizes the number of objects in each group.

The number of objects in group A is what percent greater than the number of objects in group B? (Round to the nearest whole number.)
rationale: The correct answer is 540. The percent by which group A exceeds group B is computed as ((A - B)/B) × 100% = ((480 - 75)/75) × 100% = (405/75) × 100% = 5.4 × 100% = 540%. Therefore, the number of objects in group A is 540% greater than the number in group B.
